steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The clause after ‘because’ explains why the action is difficult: weeds spread easily and become unmanageable, so the blank must mean trying to stop or prevent their spread.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
Halting means stopping, which matches the idea of preventing weed spread.
Retrieving, saving, and pretending do not convey stopping spread and do not fit the context.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
